name: Pumpkin Pie
recipeIngredient: 2 large eggs or 1/2 cup egg product
1 pie crust (graham cracker crumb) or prebaked crust
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, combine gelatin, cornstarch, cinnamon, nutmeg, ginger, and salt.
2. Stir in pumpkin and evaporated skim milk. Let stand 5 minutes to soften the gelatin.
3. Cook and stir over medium heat until the mixture bubbles; cook and stir for 2 more minutes.
4. Remove from heat. Gradually stir 1 cup of hot mixture into eggs; return all egg mixture to the saucepan.
5. Cook and stir over low heat for 2 minutes.
6. Do not boil. Remove from heat. Stir in Equal.
7. Pour into baked pie crust. Cover and chill 6 hours or overnight.
Makes 8 servings.
